problem id: e67cbe88
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10000110 -> 00010000
  00011010 -> 01101001
  11010011 -> 01000001
  00010000 -> 01000001
  11001000 -> 00101100
  11100101 -> 10011010
  01111001 -> 11100011
  11101101 -> 10111010
  00010110 -> 01011001

query: 01110100
predicted answer: 11010111
